column1:
Guide:
1. Input the amount of cloth that your going to unravell.
2. Input your current AH prices to all fields with a star (*).
3. Now you will be able to see your total estimated profit
after AH fee, and you can also use the Spool Crafted Price
to override in CraftSim or other crafts in the sheet.
(Find the optimal setup below)
column5:
Guide:
1. This Weavercloth Bolt crafting setup requires you to unravell your own weavercloth. Input your Weavercloth
amount that you are going to unravell.
2.Input all other fields with a star (*) with your current AH Prices.
3.You can now see your  expected profit after AH cut, and you can also see the Weavercloth Bolt Crafted value,
which you can use to override in Craftsim or other crafts in the sheet.
(Find the optimal setup below)
column10:
Guide:
1. This Exquisite Bolt crafting setup requires you to unravell your own weavercloth and Craft your own Weavercloth Bolts.
Input your Weavercloth amount that you are going tto start with and unravell.
2.Input all other fields with a star (*) with your current AH Prices.
3.You can now see your expected profit after AH cut.
(Find the optimal setup below)
